title: oligonucleotide_hybridization_v1 — ASO:nucleic-acid duplex thermodynamics + off-target screen row
description: Output schema for _python_bridge/module/oligonucleotide_hybridization_sim.py. Two row shapes share the schema id: (A) a per-duplex thermodynamics row from duplex_report(); (B) an off-target-screen row from screen_off_targets(). Thermodynamics follow the SantaLucia (1998) unified nearest-neighbor model (PNAS 95:1460-1465); the van 't Hoff two-state Tm. HONESTY: any PASS produced alongside these rows is an in-silico simulator-consistency result ONLY (AGENTS.tape g8 / f2) — never a therapeutic, clinical, regulatory, immunogenic, knockdown, or efficacy claim. The OLIGONUCLEOTIDE axis is expansion-main (NOT core-5); the modality is described via its own drug precedent (nusinersen/Spinraza, patisiran/Onpattro, inclisiran), never derived from the n=6 lattice (g3 / f1 / f_lattice_fit).

sequence_5to3.description: duplex top strand, 5'->3' (U normalized to T)

total_strand_M.description: total strand concentration C_T (mol/L) used in the Tm equation

dH_kcal_mol.description: standard-state enthalpy of duplex formation (kcal/mol), NN sum + initiation

off_target_dG_gate_kcal_mol.description: ΔG°(37) gate; a window at or below this value is flagged as a candidate off-target

min_duplex_dG37_kcal_mol.description: most stable (most negative) duplex ΔG°(37) found across the decoy pool
